description: 낡지만 정갈한 여관 방이다. 작은 창문으로 따스한 햇살이 들어와 이불 위를 비춘다.

descriptions.morning: Morning light spills through the small window, painting warm rectangles across the worn quilt.
descriptions.night: The room is lit only by a dying candle. Shadows cling to the corners like whispered secrets.

sub_npcs.description: curls up on the windowsill, purring softly.
